What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Two black subwoofers with silver trim rings sit inside a dark enclosure within the trunk. Two amplifiers with silver top plates rest on the grey carpeted floor in front of the speakers. A beige dashboard with a glove compartment and black air vents occupies the passenger side. An open dark-colored door reveals a tan interior panel with a hanging seatbelt strap.
